series_metadata.series_description: In order for licensed facilities with the Ohio State Board of Pharmacy to destroy controlled substances they must request permission to destroy in writing. Writing includes e-mail, letter or submission to our online permission to destroy request link.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper: Scan or retain on site for 2 years and offsite for 3 years. ; Electronic: Electronic: retain on server for 5 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
